mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO session_metrics_agg_1m ( instance_id, database_id, collected_at, total_sessions, active_sessions, waiting_sessions, idle_sessions, idle_txn_sessions, idle_txn_aborted_sessions, lock_wait_count, io_wait_count, lwlock_wait_count, client_wait_count, avg_tx_duration_sec, avg_lock_wait_sec, used_connections, max_connections, deadlock_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{m.instanceId}, #{m.databaseId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.totalSessions}, #{m.activeSessions}, #{m.waitingSessions}, #{m.idleSessions}, #{m.idleInTxSessions}, #{m.idleInTxAbortedSessions}, #{m.lockWaitCount}, #{m.ioWaitCount}, #{m.lwlockWaitCount}, #{m.clientWaitCount}, #{m.avgTxDurationSec}, #{m.avgLockWaitSec}, #{m.usedConnections}, #{m.maxConnections}, #{m.deadlockCount}, NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, database_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_sessions = EXCLUDED.total_sessions, active_sessions = EXCLUDED.active_sessions, waiting_sessions = EXCLUDED.waiting_sessions, idle_sessions = EXCLUDED.idle_sessions, idle_txn_sessions = EXCLUDED.idle_txn_sessions, idle_txn_aborted_sessions = EXCLUDED.idle_txn_aborted_sessions, lock_wait_count = EXCLUDED.lock_wait_count, io_wait_count = EXCLUDED.io_wait_count, lwlock_wait_count = EXCLUDED.lwlock_wait_count, client_wait_count = EXCLUDED.client_wait_count, avg_tx_duration_sec = EXCLUDED.avg_tx_duration_sec, avg_lock_wait_sec = EXCLUDED.avg_lock_wait_sec, used_connections = EXCLUDED.used_connections, max_connections = EXCLUDED.max_connections, deadlock_count = EXCLUDED.deadlock_count, created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, active_sessions AS activeSessions, idle_sessions AS idleSessions, waiting_sessions AS waitingSessions FROM session_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, lock_wait_count AS lockWaitCount, io_wait_count AS ioWaitCount, client_wait_count AS clientWaitCount, lwlock_wait_count AS lwlockWaitCount FROM session_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, used_connections AS usedConnections FROM session_metrics_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at
